feed.title: SAP Community - SAP ERP
feed.subtitle: SAP ERP Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: When the new SAP Note for RFHUDSP will be available (containing new legal requirement)?
entry.content:
Hi All,

Please kindly advise when the new SAP Note for RFHUDSP will be available (containing new legal requirement)? 

Thank you,

Bozena

entry.title: Display samples pulled per material
entry.content:
Hi all,

I'm doing a project where I'm reducing the number of samples pulled of a certain type.

I'm wondering if there's a T-Code I can use to pull a report for each sample pulled for a material. I've been trying QA02 but that's specific to an Inspection Lot which is already released and I'm hoping to get the samples required for a material regardless of an Inspection Lot released (i.e. to display samples which aren't SAP orders etc).

I don'd mind having to manually go through each material if that's required, but if there's a way to pull in mass it would be great as I'll have about 700 to go through.

Thanks in advance,

David

entry.title: The support report for the asset process with the AFAB transaction is incomplete when we process mor
entry.content:
Hi everybody, I am new user of this community and I have a question for you... I hope you can help us with this.

We are processing the amortization of machinery assets, there are more than 1000, therefore, we run the process in background mode and the system does not give us the complete final report. There are more than 1400 assets and only a little more than 700 appear in the previus report.

Is there any way to make the previous report show more than 1000 assets?

entry.title: How to link a Storage bin / Material with a Storage Location
entry.content:
Hi,

I would like to link a dedicated a [Storage type 4 / Storage Section / Storage Bin 4] with the Storage location 2 (see below).

The idea is that when I will transfer a material in the Storage Bin 4, it will only be link with the Storage Location 2.

For your information, the Storage Location 2 has a specific setup (Storage location stock excluded from MRP) that should only apply to the [Storage type 4 / Storage Section / Storage Bin 4].

I have seen in several posts that there is no link between a Storage Location and a Storage Type / Bin so my question is :

How can I set up so that the item code that goes into Storage Bin 4 is only linked to Storage Location 2 ?

entry.title: Automatic transfer of an asset when changing Cost Center
entry.content: When I change a cost center (resulting in Profit Center change) system generates automatic transfer document. I know this is generate by the Time independent setting for the company code. My question is - how system determines the transaction types to be used for that transfer? (SAP ECC 6.0)

entry.title: Oracle create inventory issue
entry.content:
Dear Team,

We are installing SAP ECC6 EHP5 with oracle 11g(11203).

We proceeds with ./RUNINSTALLER after that it prompts for oracle installer and when we have executed "create inventory" step using OUI, the OUI gets hang in "Create Inventory directory  but not asking for next step "prerequisite checks".

We are stuck here from last one month but its hang in processing stage of "create inventory".

entry.title: How can I deactivate the deletion of PIRs me that have already been served?
entry.content:
We are in the pre-planning environment (PIR).
How can I deactivate the deletion of pre-planned requirements that have already been served (i.e. where a withdrawal quantity exceeds the planned quantity, see MD73)?

This is relevant because I have a rolling plan that, among other things, is handed over again.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: ME21N Document overview within the Selection variant
entry.content:
I create POs under ME21N and have created several variants and would like them to appear in the drop-down under the document overview when I click on the selection variant icon. How can I add to that drop-down list so that my variants appear? 

For more info.....I have built several variants that include pulling certain reqs that meet specfic criteria and then naming them, for example, one might be called  "capital reqs" variant and they all fall under one purchasing group. Then I want to save that variant to the drop-down within the document overview. That way every time I go into ME21N to create a PO I can leave open the document overview click on the "selection variant" icon choose the captial variant from the drop-down that I saved and pull only those reqs that I want to see. This was set up for me in the past so I have some currently in my drop-down, but do not know how to add more. The screenshot below are the ones that were added previously and no one seems to know how to add more.

entry.title: Creation of condition records not possible in Scheduling Agreement
entry.content:
Hello SAP Gurus,

When I'm trying to create conditions for new velidity period for existing SA, update gets canceled. When change is made in ME32L with new validity period (01.01.2025-31.12.2025 with reference to previous one 01.01.2024-31.12.2024) I get info that change was saved. However changes are not visable at all and after a moment I get notification that update was canceled:

Doc type is YIC. It seems that I have a deadlock on some processes:

Do you have any idea on how to handle that case so these new prices can be updated?

Many thanks!

entry.title: Required default permission as execute in OS level for files generating from Application side
entry.content:
Hello SAP Team,

 

We have developed a custom program which is generating few files at OS level with default read/write (-rw-rw----) permissions and later those files are picked by CPI interface (Cloud platform integration) via cloud connector.

 

We are using cloud connector as a middleware between CPI and on premise ECC system and all the connections are working fine with a generic user which we have created for SFTP from CPI to ECC system.

 

Currently we are facing issue where SFTP user is not able to execute the files placed in OS directory from CPI end as those are generating with read/write permissions and we have to manually provide execute permission to execute the entire workflow.

 

Is there any way where we can provide by default execute permission (775 or 755) to newly generated files whenever the program is running and the files will be generated with execute permission so that SFTP user can perform the necessary action to complete the workflow.

 

Currently we have a workaround where we have setup a cronjob at OS end at interval of 30 mins which is providing 775 permission to all files generating inside the source directory so that SFTP user can perform execute action on those.

 

Please assist if there is any possible way where we can restrict the files at OS end to generate with default 775 or 755 permission.

 

 

 

Regards,

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: No object definition exists for customizing object V_FINSC_VAR
entry.content:
while I am assigning fiscal year to company code, I am getting above error message, Please let me know if one knows. 

Message No. TK427

Diagnosis

The Customizing object R3TR VDAT V_FINSC_VAR is not defined in the tables of the Change and Transport System.

This means that you cannot use the Transport Organizer to edit it.

System Response

The function terminates.

Procedure

First check whether the name of the object is correct. Then you (or the system administrator) should check the object definition, to ensure that the object was created correctly (transaction SOBJ).

If the object does not exist, then create it or delete it from the request/task.

entry.title: MRP report for Open PO monthly wise
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

 

We already have custom T-code for MRP report which includes 

Plant

FGEX Total Mat. Count

FGEX Material

Packing Material

Pack Mat. Desc.

Prod. Allocation

Status

Status Valid Date

Week

Unrestricted

In qual. Insp.

Stock

Req. Qty.

Qty. to be Proc.

Open PO Qty.

Open PO Qty.From Previous months

Open PR Qty.

Diff.

I need to include Open PO for monthly wise instead of Open PO Qty.From Previous months in total.


can anyone suggest how to do this its urgent ?

entry.title: Leap Year in ECC 8
entry.content:
Hi There 

Does Anyone Know SAP has a Sap Note about leap years?

** in Sap ECC 8 **

If There is, please give the Sap Note Number.

Thanks

entry.title: problems with ui5 application deployments
entry.content:
good morning to all,
I have a question about this that came up when I wanted to deploy my ui5 application.
I have never been asked for “Authentication required to access the ATO Service” and I wanted to know where I can find the credentials I must enter .
Also if someone can explain me the reason for this message I would appreciate it very much,
(this happened after running the command “npm run deploy-config”)

 

thank you for your time.

max

entry.title: Equipment fields not visible in display mode, but in edit mode.
entry.content:
Dear all,

In equipment management we have a strange case where some fields are not visible in display mode (IE03)  but in edit mode (IE02).

I put some screen shots.

Do you have any idea ?

Regards

Brice

entry.title: Enhance MIR7 multiple account assignment ALV
entry.content:
I want to add another column to the multiple account assignment ALV(The WBS description). Is it possible without any Repair object?
 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Replikation aus dem WM ans ERP
entry.content:
Hallo zusammen,

ich verzweifle langsam. Wir haben ein dezentrales WM im Einsatz. Beide Systeme sind R3 SAP.

Sobald eine Lieferung im WM WA-gebucht wird, wird automatisch das ein IDOC vom Nachrichtentyp SHP_OBDLV_CONFIRM_DECENTRAL erstellt und an das ERP gesendet. 

Meine Frage ist jetzt, ob es eine Möglichkeit gibt auch vor dem Warenausgang eine Replikation ans ERP zu senden, wenn sich zum Beispiel die Liefermenge ändert. 

 

Ich bin für jeden Tipp dankbar. 

Gruß

entry.title: Sospensione operazione di un ordine di produzione
entry.content:
Salve, è possibile sospendere un'operazione di un ordine di produzione per un determinato periodo di tempo?
se sì, come si fa?

entry.title: Capitalizing the entries in the Country and Region tables
entry.content:
We had a request to capitalize the entries for the descriptions in the Country and Region tables, for example changing Canada to CANADA and Alberta to ALBERTA.

Does anyone know if there are any impacts on the base SAP system if we do this? I cannot find any documentation on this.

entry.title: FIFO - valuation based on Valuation Type
entry.content:
Hi,

I activated FIFO at Company Level.

My Customer has some materials managed at Split valuation.
We have 2 split valuation: The first "VAL_COM" is valorized at standard price. The second "NN_VAL_COM" is always valorized at zero, because the stock are asset-

When I run the Tcode MRF1 the system calculate the total stock summed both of split valuation "NN_VAL_COM" and "VAL_COM". In this way the final result of FIFO is wrong.

 

 

I have seen that in the table MYMFT there is the field "Valuation Type"(BWTAR) but in my case is always blank.

 

Is there some method to exclude the stock in split valuation "NN_VAL_COM" of the FIFO Calculate or manage the calculation of FIFO split in Valuation type?

 

Thanks
